skills.name: Open Box Route
skills.summary: game=sokoban | skill=Open Box Route | effects=attack_completed | context=use when attacking by pushing a box off a wall or along a column to free its path toward the target area
skills.description: Moves the worker around an accessible side of a box to get behind it, opening a valid push route. Use it in Sokoban when a box is reachable but blocked from the needed pushing direction.

skills.name: Avoid Deadlock Pushes
skills.summary: game=sokoban | skill=Avoid Deadlock Pushes | effects=defend_completed | context=use on tag_defend when a box is deadlocked or near a wall/corner; stop futile pushes, preserve worker mobility, and stay positioned to avoid making the box unsolvable
skills.description: Before pushing a box, check that the destination won’t trap it against a wall or in a corner unless that square is a goal. Use this in midgame when repositioning near edges so you preserve future push

skills.name: Push Box Onto Target
skills.summary: game=sokoban | skill=push box onto target | effects=execute_completed | context=use when a box is aligned for a final push into a target square, especially pushing up or left into an open target
skills.description: Push a box one square onto a target by moving the worker behind it and shoving it forward. Use this when a box is lined up with a target and the destination square is open, without trapping the box.

skills.name: Probe Corridor Access
skills.summary: game=sokoban | skill=Probe Corridor Access | effects=explore_completed | context=use during exploration to test corridor routes toward a trapped box and avoid repeated side-to-side oscillation
skills.description: Moves the worker down narrow hallways and dead-end passages to check whether they connect to useful pushing positions or trap routes. Use it when the remaining box’s path is unclear and you need to re

skills.name: Reach Push Position
skills.summary: game=sokoban | skill=Reach Push Position | effects=navigate_completed | context=navigate around boxes and walls to get behind/below/beside a target box and set up the next push toward the goal
skills.description: Move the worker to the exact square beside a box needed for the next push, without moving any boxes yet. Use this in Sokoban when setting up a planned push path, especially early in the level.

skills.name: Detect Deadlock Early
skills.summary: game=sokoban | skill=detect_deadlock_early | effects=optimize_completed | context=use when a box is irretrievably stuck and the puzzle is unsolvable, to stop oscillating and end with minimal wasted moves
skills.description: Detects deadlocks early by checking whether a pushed box is trapped against walls, in corners, or blocking narrow corridors without reaching a goal. Use it before every push, especially in endgames, t

skills.name: Get Behind Box
skills.summary: game=sokoban | skill=Get Behind Box | effects=position_completed | context=move to the safe pushing side of a box, typically below or beside it, to line up the next push toward a target
skills.description: Move the worker around to stand directly behind a box, on the side opposite the direction you want to push. Use this in Sokoban before any push, especially early on when setting up a box’s path.

skills.name: Reach Upper-Left Access
skills.summary: game=sokoban | skill=Reach Upper-Left Access | effects=setup_completed | context=use during setup to reposition the worker toward the top opening or below the box so the box can be approached from its upper-left side and safely pushed downward
skills.description: Move the worker into the upper-left access route by navigating to the left side and then up around the box. Use this when you need top-left positioning to approach or push the box from below or the ri

skills.name: Hold Position Safely
skills.summary: game=sokoban | skill=Hold Position Safely | effects=survive_completed | context=use when survival is tagged and pushing would cause useless oscillation; make a safe non-push move instead
skills.description: Keeps the worker on a safe floor tile without pushing the box into a wall or corner, preserving future moves. Use it in midgame when the path is tight and any push could trap the only box or block acc
